---
title: "Single-Cell Analysis with Python"
subtitle: "A practical, hands-on guide from raw data to biological insight using scanpy & the scverse ecosystem"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  - id: tutorials
    contents: tutorials.yml
    template: ../../_templates/tutorial-card.ejs
---

```{=html}
<div class="tut-series-overview">
<div class="tut-stat-group">
<div class="tut-stat-item"><span class="tut-stat-val">20+</span><span class="tut-stat-lbl">Lessons</span></div>
<div class="tut-stat-item"><span class="tut-stat-val">6</span><span class="tut-stat-lbl">Modules</span></div>
<div class="tut-stat-item"><span class="tut-stat-val">Python</span><span class="tut-stat-lbl">Language</span></div>
<div class="tut-stat-item"><span class="tut-stat-val">All Levels</span><span class="tut-stat-lbl">Audience</span></div>
<div class="tut-stat-item"><span class="tut-stat-val">Free</span><span class="tut-stat-lbl">Access</span></div>
</div>
<div class="tut-tools-row">
<span class="tut-tool-chip">scanpy</span>
<span class="tut-tool-chip">anndata</span>
<span class="tut-tool-chip">scvi-tools</span>
<span class="tut-tool-chip">cellrank</span>
<span class="tut-tool-chip">squidpy</span>
<span class="tut-tool-chip">Python</span>
<span class="tut-tool-chip">Jupyter</span>
</div>
</div>
```

:::{#tutorials}
:::
